concerns.text: Plan lists contracts/knot_record.schema.yaml and contracts/regression_output.schema.yaml, but contracts/ contains multiple schema variants (knot-record.schema.yaml, knot_record.schema.yaml, knot_dataset.schema.yaml, regression-model.schema.yaml, regression_model.schema.yaml, regression_output.schema.yaml). Clarify which schema files are authoritative and ensure plan references match actual filenames.

KnotRecord entity defines fields (knot_id, crossing_number, braid_index, hyperbolic_volume, alternating, data_quality_flags, missing_invariant_flags, source) but knot_record.schema.yaml contract includes additional required fields (name, source_timestamp, checksum_sha256) not documented in data model. Align data model entity definition with contract schema requirements.

SC-001 references validation_scope.md document that must contain crossing number ≤10 vs ≤13 distinction, but plan.md Project Structure does not list validation_scope.md in docs/reproducibility/ directory. Add this artifact to project structure or remove reference from SC-001.

Three regression model schema variants exist (regression-model.schema.yaml, regression_model.schema.yaml, regression_output.schema.yaml) with different structures. Plan references regression_output.schema.yaml but data-model.md defines RegressionModel entity. Consolidate to single canonical schema and update plan/data-model references accordingly.
